title: Vue with APIs (HTTP Requests) Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of Axios/Fetch, lifecycle hook integration, and managing loading/error states.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary role of an HTTP request in a Vue app?
options: To fetch data from or save data to an external API.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which popular library is commonly used for making HTTP requests in Vue.js applications?
Which lifecycle hook is the best place to initially fetch data from an API when a component loads?
Why is it important to manage 'loading' and 'error' states during API calls?
options: To show spinners or messages to the user while the request is pending or if it fails.
To make the code look more complex.
To only speed up the network speed.

questions.question: Does the Fetch API require any external library installation in modern browsers?
options: No, it is built directly into all modern browsers.
Only in older versions of Vue.
